prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on furan at DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Single-point on the user-supplied geometry. SCF converged in 9 cycles. HOMO = −6.3597638 eV (index 17), LUMO = −0.1024036 eV (index 18), HOMO–LUMO gap = 6.2573602 eV (headline value). No warnings reported; all integrity checks passed (trustworthy: true). Software: PySCF via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill. No solvent (gas phase). Koopmans-style vertical IP = 6.3598 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024 eV.
